typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-semibold text-emerald-900
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-stone-900
typography.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-medium text-stone-500

spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-12

components.button_primary: bg-emerald-900 text-white hover:bg-emerald-800 transition-colors duration-200 px-6 py-3 rounded-lg shadow-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:ring-offset-2
components.button_secondary: bg-white text-emerald-900 border border-stone-200 hover:bg-stone-50 transition-colors duration-200 px-6 py-3 rounded-lg
components.card: bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm p-6 transition-shadow hover:shadow-md
components.glass_header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-stone-200 sticky top-0 z-50
components.upload_zone: border-2 border-dashed border-stone-300 rounded-lg p-12 text-center hover:bg-emerald-50 hover:border-emerald-500 transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4
components.status_badge_healthy: px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 text-sm font-medium
components.status_badge_disease: px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-rose-100 text-rose-800 text-sm font-medium

landing.strategy: High visual impact using 'Tetris' bento grid. Big emotive imagery of cattle and tech. Grounded yet modern.
landing.layout: Hero section with wide imagery and overlay. Features in an asymmetrical bento grid. Use generous spacing (py-24).

dashboard.strategy: Control room grid. High density, data correlation, easy scanning. Minimalist animations.
dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (bg-stone-50). Main content area with top KPI summary cards (col-span-1), then a primary chart (col-span-2 or 3) and recent lists.

prediction_result.strategy: EMR (Electronic Medical Record) style layout. Clinical clarity combined with AI transparency.
prediction_result.layout: Two column bento layout. Left: Large uploaded image with Grad-CAM heatmap overlay (mix-blend-multiply). Right: Diagnostic results, breed identification, confidence bars, and treatment suggestions.

hero_background.description: Lush green field with cattle - use as a subtle background or large hero image

feature_ai_scan.description: Holstein cows standing in a dairy barn - use for demonstrating the AI scan feature

feature_vet_care.description: Farmer/Vet preparing syringe - use for treatment/vet suggestions feature

dashboard_placeholder_cow.description: Close up of brown cow - use as a placeholder for uploaded image in prediction results

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Examples: data-testid='login-btn', data-testid='upload-dropzone', data-testid='prediction-disease-name'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load 'Outfit' (weights 400,500,600) and 'IBM Plex Sans' (weights 400,500) from Google Fonts in index.css.
Use lucide-react for icons. Size them appropriately (w-5 h-5 for buttons, w-8 h-8 for empty states).
For the Landing page, implement the Tetris bento grid pattern with asymmetrical sizing to break the generic tech look.
For the Dashboard, use the Control Room grid pattern with tight gaps and strict alignment. Ensure cards stretch to fill height.
Ensure the header uses Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80) with a 1px bottom border. DO NOT use a fully transparent header.
For the Grad-CAM heatmap overlay, use an absolute positioned div over the image. Use a radial gradient with mix-blend-multiply or opacity-50 to simulate heat over the affected area of the cattle.
Use Recharts for the analytics dashboard. Map chart colors to the primary (Emerald-900, Emerald-600) and accent (Amber-600) palettes.
Ensure all buttons, form inputs, links, and key diagnostic text elements have explicit data-testid attributes.
Do not use generic terms for data-testid. Be specific to the feature (e.g., 'history-table-row', 'export-pdf-btn').
For components, use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing sections to allow creative freedom. Use Shadcn components for complex interactive logic like Data Tables, Dialogs, and Selects in the dashboard.
Use 'rounded-lg' globally for a soft but structured 'tactile' neumorphic feel on cards and buttons.
